title: alyssum balkanicum var. depressum
intro: Alyssum balkanicum var. depressum, also known as creeping alyssum, is a low-growing, flowering perennial plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Alyssum balkanicum var. depressum include its ability to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies.
